text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 323 

PRE_ICL_INNPP_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 
3- months) on this tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP) during the pre-initial 
coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT
